---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 6
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── QIBAR Blog — Page d'accueil ─────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* Hero */
.qibar-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0C2440 0%, #1A3A5C 60%, #2A5A8C 100%);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 3.5rem 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.qibar-hero::before {
  content: "Q";
  position: absolute;
  right: -1rem;
  top: -2rem;
  font-family: Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 14rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: rgba(200,169,110,0.07);
  pointer-events: none;
  line-height: 1;
}
.qibar-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  max-width: 680px;
}
.qibar-hero-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  background: rgba(200,169,110,0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,169,110,0.35);
  border-radius: 99px;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #C8A96E;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}
.qibar-hero h1 {
  font-family: Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 2.4rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #ffffff;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}
.qibar-hero h1 span {
  color: #C8A96E;
}
.qibar-hero .hero-sub {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #B5C8DD;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin: 0 0 2rem;
}
.hero-cta-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-cta-primary {
  background: #C8A96E;
  color: #1A3A5C;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 9px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity .2s;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.hero-cta-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; color: #1A3A5C; }
.hero-cta-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: #F0E6CC;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 9px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,169,110,0.4);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all .2s;
}
.hero-cta-secondary:hover {
  background: rgba(200,169,110,0.1);
  color: #F0E6CC;
}
.hero-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-stat .stat-val {
  font-family: Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #C8A96E;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1;
}
.hero-stat .stat-label {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #7A9AB8;
  display: block;
  margin-top: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* Section titres */
.qibar-section-hd {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 2.5rem 0 1.25rem;
}
.qibar-section-hd h2 {
  font-family: Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1A3A5C;
  margin: 0;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}
.qibar-section-hd .sec-line {
  flex: 1;
  height: 1.5px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #C8A96E, transparent);
}
.qibar-section-hd .sec-tag {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #7A7068;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Thématiques */
.topics-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.topic-card {
  background: #F5F2EE;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #D8D0C5;
  transition: transform .2s, border-color .2s;
  cursor: default;
}
.topic-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  border-color: #1A3A5C;
}
.topic-icon {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  display: block;
}
.topic-name {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1A3A5C;
  margin: 0 0 3px;
}
.topic-desc {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #7A7068;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* Encadré À qui s'adresse ce blog */
.audience-box {
  background: #1A3A5C;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem 2rem;
  margin: 2.5rem 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.audience-item .aud-title {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #C8A96E;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.audience-item .aud-desc {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: #B5C8DD;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

/* Encadré QIBAR Center */
.qibar-cta-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A3A5C, #0C2440);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem 2.25rem;
  margin: 2.5rem 0 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.qibar-cta-box .cta-text p {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: #7A9AB8;
  margin: 4px 0 0;
}
.qibar-cta-box .cta-text strong {
  font-family: Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: #F0E6CC;
}
.qibar-cta-btn {
  background: #C8A96E;
  color: #1A3A5C;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 9px;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: opacity .2s;
}
.qibar-cta-btn:hover { opacity: 0.88; color: #1A3A5C; }
</style>

<!-- ── HERO ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="qibar-hero">
  <div class="qibar-hero-inner">
    <div class="qibar-hero-badge">&#9679; QIBAR &nbsp;·&nbsp; Data · Research · Formation</div>
    <h1>L'analyse de données,<br><span>au service de la recherche en santé.</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Un espace de partage pour chercheurs, étudiants et professionnels de santé
      qui veulent maîtriser R, produire des analyses rigoureuses
      et publier des résultats solides.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-cta-row">
      <a href="#latest-posts" class="hero-cta-primary">Lire les articles →</a>
      <a href="about.html" class="hero-cta-secondary">À propos de QIBAR</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="stat-val">R</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Langage principal</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="stat-val">6+</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Domaines couverts</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="stat-val">A</span>
        <span class="stat-label">Bamako · Mali</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── THÉMATIQUES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="qibar-section-hd">
  <h2>Thématiques</h2>
  <div class="sec-line"></div>
  <span class="sec-tag">Ce qu'on couvre</span>
</div>
<div class="topics-grid">
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">📊</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Analyse statistique</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Tests, régression, modélisation sous R</p>
  </div>
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">🗺️</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Cartographie</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Épidémiologie spatiale, cartes avec sf & ggplot2</p>
  </div>
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">🔬</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Méta-analyse</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Forest plots, hétérogénéité, meta & metafor</p>
  </div>
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">📝</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Rédaction scientifique</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Plans d'analyse, méthodes, résultats, Zotero</p>
  </div>
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">📈</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Visualisation</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Figures pub-ready, tableaux cliniques</p>
  </div>
  <div class="topic-card">
    <span class="topic-icon">🧬</span>
    <p class="topic-name">Santé publique</p>
    <p class="topic-desc">Épidémiologie, drépanocytose, études de terrain</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── À QUI ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="audience-box">
  <div class="audience-item">
    <p class="aud-title">🎓 Étudiants</p>
    <p class="aud-desc">Master, doctorat, thèse de médecine — des tutos pas à pas pour analyser tes données et rédiger tes résultats avec confiance.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="audience-item">
    <p class="aud-title">🔭 Chercheurs</p>
    <p class="aud-desc">Protocoles, plans d'analyse, méta-analyses, visualisations publication-ready — des ressources pour chaque étape de ta recherche.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="audience-item">
    <p class="aud-title">🏥 Professionnels de santé</p>
    <p class="aud-desc">Épidémiologistes, data managers, médecins en exercice — des outils concrets pour valoriser tes données de terrain.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {style="
```{=html}
<p style="font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1.1rem;
    font-style:italic;color:#F0EBE3;margin:0 0 .5rem">
```

Chaque nouvel article de Boozy dans ta boîte mail.

</p>

<p style="font-size:.85rem;color:#7A9AB8;margin:0 0 1.25rem">

Pas de spam. Juste de la méthode, du R, et de la motivation.

</p>

<!-- Remplace l'action par ton URL Brevo/Mailchimp -->

<form action="https://05f21676.sibforms.com/serve/MUIFAHfzQavUsQ25ClxHkhgyITPxGFeTR79hKPi-i-VOfFk0F7R3HuIbFokqmCDqXvOhNsdF7CX5LhuQrvl6nKX_k08wLqu-LnjIdSjL4w2xH8boR3DhVGDterAmxByQH7Cyy5tWnpPJHGihMKzOlKClCXmgCFVLsj2_d9gZhFQu9U6QZK9zAQ0F-ABrMl4oZi1bgAJP8RPKvlo7LA==" method="post" style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap">

<input type="email" name="EMAIL" placeholder="votre@email.com"
      style="padding:.6rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;border:none;
             font-size:.9rem;width:240px;outline:none"/> <button type="submit"
      style="background:#C8A96E;color:#1A3A5C;font-weight:700;
             padding:.6rem 1.4rem;border-radius:8px;border:none;
             cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem"> S'abonner → </button>

</form>
:::

## Articles récents {.qibar-section-hd}

```{=html}
<!-- ── CTA QIBAR CENTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="qibar-cta-box">
  <div class="cta-text">
    <strong>Besoin d'aide pour votre analyse de données ?</strong>
    <p>QIBAR Conseil accompagne étudiants, chercheurs et institutions — de la conception à la publication.</p>
  </div>
  <a href="mailto:mahamoud.koureichi@gmail.com" class="qibar-cta-btn">Contacter QIBAR →</a>
</div>
```
